runTitle: v8.11.173 Vercel Playwright MCP Reporter Review Fixes
coveredSurfaces: Landing route / render with v8.11.173 badge
Dashboard route /dashboard render with 18-server OTel snapshot
AI sidebar open and engine Ready indicator
Reporter UI periodic operations report generation
Reporter no-incident report card and detail view
skippedSurfaces: Forced production degraded Reporter provider fallback path
Live disk-threshold breach path because current production snapshot has no disk metric above the production threshold

expertAssessments.rationale: Reporter no-incident UI generation, report detail rendering, production API status, and regression-test-only edge paths covered the review fixes at the right risk level.
The release preserved the authenticated UI path and used the normal CSRF-protected Reporter flow instead of bypassing production controls.
GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel production deployment, Cloud Run health, and Vercel usage were all verified after release.
Local regression tests covered disk timeline, SLA short-window threshold, and command dedup edge cases; Playwright MCP covered the rendered production Reporter surface.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period effective $11.4422, billed $0.0000; no unexpected billed usage observed after v8.11.173 production QA.
Cloud Run ai-engine /health returned status ok, version 8.11.173, routesReady true, redis degraded false.

completedImprovements.title: Reporter timeline records disk threshold breaches
completedImprovements.evidence: reporter-pipeline-report.test.ts disk timeline regression plus v8.11.173 release QA

completedImprovements.title: Reporter short snapshot SLA violation threshold avoids false severe violation
completedImprovements.evidence: reporter-pipeline-report.test.ts short-window SLA regression plus v8.11.173 release QA

completedImprovements.title: Reporter no-incident path deduplicates repeated top command actions
completedImprovements.evidence: reporter-pipeline.test.ts no-incident command dedup regression plus v8.11.173 release QA

notes: Local validation before release: targeted Reporter vitest 27/27 pass, ai-sdk agents vitest 401/401 pass, cloud-run/ai-engine npm test 1328/1328 pass, type-check pass.
Production Reporter generated a no-incident report with 18 total servers, 17 normal, 1 warning, and 0 risk servers.
Disk threshold and SLA review fixes remain local-regression-test verified because the live production OTel snapshot did not contain a disk metric above the production critical threshold.
